description: My laptop screen has gone completely black. It was working fine yesterday but now when I press the power button I can hear it start up but nothing displays on screen.
Can you please install Adobe Acrobat on my workstation? I need it to review PDF contracts sent by clients.
The entire office on floor 3 has lost internet connectivity. Nobody on this floor can access any websites or internal systems. This is affecting about 20 people.
I have been locked out of my Active Directory account after entering the wrong password too many times. Please reset my password and unlock the account.
My email signature is not displaying correctly in Outlook. The company logo appears as a red X instead of the actual image.
The printer on the second floor (HP LaserJet, asset tag HW-0234) is showing a paper jam error but there is no visible paper inside. It has been like this since this morning.
Microsoft Excel keeps crashing whenever I try to open files larger than 10MB. I have tried restarting but the issue persists. I need this fixed urgently as I have reports due.
Please grant me read access to the shared finance drive at \\fileserver\finance. My manager David Clarke has approved this request.
I received a suspicious email claiming to be from our CEO asking me to purchase gift cards urgently. I did not click any links. Flagging this as a potential phishing attempt.
My keyboard is missing several keys — specifically the letters N, M, and the spacebar have stopped registering keystrokes. The keyboard is a Dell wired USB model.
Please install the VPN client on my new laptop so I can work from home. I have the company VPN credentials but the software is not installed.
The production web server (SRV-PROD-01) appears to be down. The company website is returning a 503 error and customers cannot place orders. Urgent attention needed.
My computer cannot connect to the Wi-Fi in the meeting room on floor 1 (Room 1B). Other rooms work fine. This has been happening for two days.
I am unable to open calendar invites sent from external Gmail addresses in Outlook. The invites show up but clicking Accept does nothing.
A former employee's account (username: d.roberts) was not disabled when they left last week. Please disable it immediately and revoke all access.
My mouse cursor is jumping around the screen randomly, making it nearly impossible to work. I have tried a different mousepad and the issue continues.
The company intranet portal is not loading in Chrome. It loads fine in Edge. I get a NET::ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID error in Chrome.
My laptop was stolen from my car over the weekend. The device has company data on it. Please remotely wipe it as soon as possible. Asset tag is LT-0891.
Zoom is crashing every time I try to share my screen during a meeting. Audio and video work fine, but screen sharing causes an immediate crash.
The docking station at desk 4C is not charging my laptop. The laptop charges fine with the regular cable, so the issue seems to be the dock.
I need access to the project management tool (Jira) for the new product launch project. Please create an account with standard user permissions.
My Outlook inbox is not syncing new emails automatically. I have to manually hit Send/Receive to see new messages. This started after a Windows update.
Our VoIP phones on the third floor have no dial tone. We cannot make or receive calls. This is impacting customer service operations.
The accounting software (Sage 50) is throwing an error: 'Cannot connect to company database' when trying to log in. Other users are not affected.
The webcam on my laptop is not being detected by any application — not Zoom, Teams, or the Camera app. Device Manager shows no webcam listed.
Please remove my access to the HR payroll system. I have moved to a new department and no longer need this access.
Our customer-facing CRM (Salesforce) is showing a blank white screen after login for all users on the sales team. This started at 9am this morning.
I accidentally deleted an important email from a client last Tuesday. Can you please recover it from the email archive or backup?
The multifunction printer in the copy room (floor 2) is not printing in colour. Black and white works fine. The colour ink cartridges were recently replaced.
I think I may have clicked a phishing link in an email. My browser opened a page asking for my Microsoft 365 login. I entered my credentials before I realised. Please help immediately.
Remote desktop connection to my office PC from home is very slow and frequently disconnects. The VPN connection itself seems stable.
Can you help me set up two-factor authentication on my Microsoft 365 account? I received a prompt but was not sure how to proceed.
My laptop battery drains from 100% to 0% in under two hours even when idle. The laptop is only 6 months old. Battery health may need checking.
I need temporary admin rights on my workstation to install a piece of licensed software required for a client project. Duration: one week.
Outlook is flagging emails from our supplier domain (@supplierco.com) as spam. Can you whitelist this domain so their emails go to my inbox?
Windows 11 update failed on my machine last night and now it boots into recovery mode. I cannot access my files or applications.
The second monitor at my desk is not being detected. It worked last week. I have tried different cables and the monitor shows a 'No Signal' message.
Several users in the Leeds office are reporting they cannot authenticate to the domain. They are receiving 'No logon servers available' error at login.
The PDF printer (printing to PDF via Microsoft Print to PDF) stopped working after a Windows update. It shows in the printer list but jobs fail silently.
Please create a new shared mailbox for the customer support team: support@company.com. Members are: t.walsh, j.burns, and p.sharma.
The SSD on my desktop PC seems to have failed. The machine won't boot and shows 'No boot device found'. I have important unsaved project files on this drive.
Microsoft Teams notifications have stopped appearing on my desktop. I can see messages when I open Teams but get no pop-up alerts or sounds.
My email is taking several minutes to send messages with attachments over 5MB. Smaller emails send instantly. This started about a week ago.
An unauthorised USB device was found plugged into a workstation in the server room (WS-SRV-04). The device has been removed. Please investigate any data access logs.
The VPN is blocking access to our cloud storage platform (SharePoint Online). When connected to VPN I get a timeout; disconnecting fixes it.
I need the Microsoft Project viewer installed on my laptop so I can open .mpp files sent by our project manager without editing them.
The file server (FS-01) disk usage is at 98%. Users are receiving 'disk full' errors when saving documents to network drives.
My USB headset is not being recognised by my computer. It worked fine last week. I have tried different USB ports with the same result.
I have joined the company and need my user account set up. My manager is Claire Foster. I will be based in the Manchester office starting 3rd February.
The antivirus software on my laptop is showing a subscription expired warning. It will not update virus definitions. Please renew or reinstall.
The wireless access point in the boardroom (AP-BOARD-01) appears to be offline. We have an important client presentation in 2 hours and need Wi-Fi restored.
I need to set up an out-of-office auto-reply in Outlook for my leave from 10th to 17th February. I have tried the settings but the option is greyed out.
The company timesheet system is throwing a 500 Internal Server Error for all users. Nobody in the company can submit their timesheets today.
The UPS (uninterruptible power supply) in the server room is beeping continuously and the display shows a battery fault. Please check urgently.
Please add me to the distribution list DL-Marketing so I receive team-wide communications. I have recently moved to the marketing department.
Power BI Desktop crashes when I try to refresh the sales dashboard data model. The data source is a SQL Server connection on SRV-SQL-02.
The fan on my desktop PC is making a loud grinding noise. The machine is still working but the noise is constant and getting louder.
My admin account password has expired and I cannot log in to manage servers. The self-service reset portal is also requiring the old password to reset.
I am getting very slow speeds when copying large files over the network (about 1MB/s instead of the usual 100MB/s). This started after a network maintenance window.
Outlook is not automatically completing email addresses from the global address list when I start typing. Autocomplete stopped working after a recent update.
Our ERP system (SAP) is showing 'System not available' for all users. No one in operations can access order or inventory data.
The touchscreen on my Surface Pro is unresponsive. The keyboard and mouse work fine but touch input is completely dead. There are no physical cracks on the screen.
Please create a new folder on the shared drive at \\fileserver\projects\2026 and give the Project Alpha team (see attached list) read/write access.
I noticed that a colleague's computer was left logged in and unlocked overnight in the open-plan office. The machine is now locked. Please log this as a security incident.
The site-to-site VPN between our London and Edinburgh offices has dropped. Edinburgh staff cannot access central systems. This has been down for 30 minutes.
I need the drawing tool Visio installed on my machine to create network diagrams for a project proposal. We have a company licence.
My laptop overheats and shuts down unexpectedly when running video calls. The bottom of the laptop becomes very hot within 20 minutes of a Zoom call.
Scheduled backup job for the database server (SRV-DB-01) has failed for the past 3 nights. Alert emails are coming to my inbox but no action has been taken.
I am receiving bounce-back messages (NDR) when trying to send emails to a specific external contact. Other recipients work fine. The error code is 550 5.1.1.
The font rendering on my desktop looks blurry. This happened after I connected an external 4K monitor. Text in all applications appears fuzzy.
I have received a ransomware warning on my screen. My desktop wallpaper has changed and files have unfamiliar extensions. I have disconnected from the network immediately.
Please change my display name in Active Directory from 'Violet Henderson' to 'Violet Chen' following my recent name change. HR has been informed.
The barcode scanner at the warehouse workstation (WS-WH-07) stopped working. The USB device is not recognised and shows an error in Device Manager.
All printers on the network are offline simultaneously. Users across the building cannot print. This coincided with a network switch being rebooted this morning.
Chrome is prompting me to update but I cannot install updates without admin rights. Can IT push the latest Chrome update to my machine?
My shared mailbox (accounts@company.com) has stopped appearing in Outlook. I can still log in to it via webmail but it has disappeared from my Outlook profile.
The network switch in cabinet 3B is showing several amber port indicator lights. Several users in the east wing have lost network connectivity.
A new contractor (M. Okafor) is starting on Monday. Please create a guest account with access to the project SharePoint site and Teams channel only. Duration: 3 months.
The Windows 10 system clock is consistently running 15 minutes slow. It affects meeting times shown in Outlook and Teams. Time sync with the NTP server may have failed.
The SQL Server reporting service (SSRS) is down. Finance team cannot generate any month-end reports. Month-end deadline is tomorrow.
Can you set up email forwarding from my old email address (a.washington@oldcompany.com) to my current address? The old domain is still active.
There is a burning smell coming from the PC under desk 7A. I have switched it off at the wall. Please do not turn it back on until it has been checked.
I need emergency access to the payroll system restored. My account was locked due to incorrect MFA attempts. Payroll processing deadline is in 3 hours.
The screen saver and lock screen settings keep reverting to defaults after every reboot. I think a Group Policy is overriding my preferences. Can this be adjusted?
Wireless connectivity in the canteen area is very poor. Signal drops out every few minutes. This has been getting progressively worse over the past two weeks.
I received an alert from our SIEM tool about unusual login activity on account p.morrison — multiple failed logins from an IP in Eastern Europe, then a successful login. Please investigate.
The CD/DVD drive on my desktop is not reading discs. The tray opens and closes fine but no disc is ever detected by the operating system.
Our video conferencing room system (Cisco Webex Board in meeting room 3A) cannot connect to scheduled meetings. The display shows 'Connecting...' indefinitely.
The DHCP server appears to have stopped assigning IP addresses. New devices and rebooted machines are getting 169.254.x.x APIPA addresses and cannot reach the network.
Please revoke all system access for employee T. Nguyen (username: t.nguyen) who left the company yesterday. HR has confirmed the termination.
Our email domain appears to have been added to a spam blacklist (Spamhaus). Several clients have reported that our emails are going to their junk folders.
The Active Directory domain controller (DC-01) is showing high CPU usage (99%) and response times for logins across the business are very slow.
I cannot find the option to record meetings in Microsoft Teams. Other team members can see the Record button but mine is missing. Possibly a licence or policy issue.
The label printer at reception (Dymo LabelWriter 550) is printing faded labels. New labels have been loaded. The print head may need cleaning or replacing.
Three user accounts appear to have been created overnight without authorisation: x.admin1, x.admin2, x.admin3. These have local admin rights. Please disable and investigate.
I need help exporting my Outlook emails to a PST file before my laptop is replaced next week. I have about 15GB of emails I want to keep.
The Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL2) is not starting after the latest Windows update. Running 'wsl' in terminal returns an error: 0x80370102.
The firewall is blocking outbound traffic on port 443 for a new SaaS application we have licensed. Can you add a rule to permit traffic to the vendor's IP range?
My ergonomic keyboard (Microsoft Sculpt) has started doubling keystrokes — typing one key outputs two characters. This makes it unusable for work.
Vulnerability scan results from last night show CVE-2025-1234 (CVSS 9.1) affecting 14 servers in the production environment. Patches need to be assessed and applied urgently.
